output.filetypetooltip: Create a deterministic zip bundle of stitch-plan benchmark artifacts

param.name: custom-file-name
param.gui-description: Defines the file names inside the zip archive. Leave empty for the document file name.

page.name: artifacts
page.label: Always included: manifest.json, metadata.json, stitch_plan.json, stats.json, threads.json

page.name: info
page.label: Benchmark Artifact Bundle
Create machine-readable benchmark outputs for clean-room comparisons and regression tests.
If objects are selected, only the current selection is processed.
This development-only export is intended for generating reference artifacts, not production embroidery output.
